name: echocut
description: Turn raw footage into brand-ready, platform-optimized video with one command. Local-first: FFmpeg + WhisperX/MLX + Ollama.

scripts.start:lite: TRANSCRIBE_ENGINE=whisperx WHISPERX_LOW_MEMORY=1 WHISPERX_MODEL=small WHISPERX_BATCH_SIZE=1 WHISPERX_DISABLE_ALIGN=1 TRANSCRIBE_TIMEOUT_MS=1200000 VIDEO_CONTENT_MODE=fast TASK_QUEUE_CONCURRENCY=1 REMOTION_SCALE=0.75 node index.js
scripts.start:cloud:2g: TRANSCRIBE_ENGINE=whisperx WHISPERX_LOW_MEMORY=1 WHISPERX_MODEL=small WHISPERX_BATCH_SIZE=1 WHISPERX_DISABLE_ALIGN=1 TRANSCRIBE_TIMEOUT_MS=1200000 VIDEO_CONTENT_MODE=fast TASK_QUEUE_CONCURRENCY=1 REMOTION_SCALE=0.75 REMOTION_CONCURRENCY=1 node index.js
scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check scripts/run-video-cases.js && node --check scripts/clip-video.js && node --check scripts/test-local-debug-cases.js && node --check scripts/benchmark-asr.js && node --check scripts/start-admin.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/admin/server.js && node --check src/admin/public/app.js && node --check src/db/index.js && node --check src/db/migrations.js && node --check src/db/contentsRepo.js && node --check src/db/configRepo.js && node --check src/services/processor.js && node --check src/services/promptLibrary.js && node --check src/services/transcriber.js && node --check src/services/notifier.js && node --check src/services/clipper.js && node --check src/video/asrAdapters.js && node --check src/video/captionUtils.js && node --check src/video/captionConfig.js && node --check src/video/fillerCutter.js && node --check src/video/coverGenerator.js && node --check src/video/postProcess.js && node --check src/video/remotionRunner.js && node --check src/bot/msgUtils.js && node --check src/bot/botSend.js && node --check src/bot/taskManager.js && node --check src/lib/cliUtils.js && node --check bin/echocut.js && node --check src/cli/commands/doctor.js && node --check src/cli/commands/burn.js && node --check src/cli/commands/studio.js && node --check src/cli/commands/highlights.js && node --check src/cli/commands/article.js && node --check src/cli/commands/batch.js && node --check src/services/transcribeLong.js && node --check src/lib/transcriptCache.js && node --check src/lib/stripEmoji.js && node --check src/lib/asrNameSanitizer.js
scripts.setup:python: python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run setup:node && npm run setup:python
scripts.debug:text:inline: node scripts/run-text-cases.js --text="这是本地联调文本样例" --title=inline
scripts.debug:video:file: node scripts/run-video-cases.js --video-dir=video_inputs --limit=1 --engine=mlx --fallback-text="本地视频字幕调试"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:unit

author: Bill Li <bill.libiao@gmail.com>
